testCases.requirement: 3 | Banner Carousel | N/A | Alphanumeric | Display | Integration | 1. Retrieve & display Carousel Title & Description based on the number of banner configured in CMS: - Carousel dot title - Banner title - Banner description 2. User can slide to move to the next banner and will be displayed in rotation 3. Display dot title for banner shown. 4. Currently defined in Figma screen is as below, title & description refer to screen: - Lifestyle - Go Further - Grow 5. App to default to first dot banner and display dot title. | CMS: 1. Multiple Carousel banner info: - Dot title - Banner title - Banner description
